visualization.datadescription: <datadefinition> <fetchcollection> <fetch mapping="logical" aggregate="true"> <entity name="account"> <attribute name="accountid" aggregate="count" alias="count" /> </entity> </fetch> </fetchcollection> <categorycollection> <category> <measurecollection> <measure alias="count" /> </measurecollection> </category> </categorycollection> </datadefinition>
